message:
fix: ensure hook write visibility before polecat startup (GH#2389)

Fix the sling race where a fresh polecat can miss its hooked work
because the Dolt commit has not propagated to new connections by the
time gt prime runs.

Two changes:

1. Sling side: Add WithAutoCommit() to hook writes in hookBeadWithRetry
   and runHook. This ensures an explicit Dolt commit after the
   status=hooked + assignee write, making it immediately visible to
   new database connections.

2. Startup side: Increase findAgentWork retry from 3 attempts with
   fixed 2s delays (4s max) to 5 attempts with exponential backoff
   (500ms, 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s = ~15.5s max). This handles edge cases
   where Dolt is under heavy write contention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
